name: ReimburseMate
tagline: AI-native reimbursement agent for receipts, expenses, and human-approved submissions.
description: ReimburseMate turns messy receipts and expense claims into structured reimbursement drafts with AI extraction, deterministic policy checks, and mandatory human approval before submission.

receipt-extractor.description: Extracts structured fields (merchant, amount, date, tax, category) from receipt text or images using NVIDIA NIM.
